name: microdata-tools-se
description: Tooling for working with Swedish administrative register microdata — metadata search and MONA project scaffolding.

interface.shortDescription: SCB metadata search and MONA project scaffolding
interface.longDescription: Use local Swedish microdata workflow tools to query SCB registry metadata with regmeta and scaffold MONA projects with mock-data guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Find the definition and value codes for a Swedish register variable.
Scaffold a local MONA project workspace with mock-data guardrails.
